Scriveners Clan

Faction / Organisation · First seen 3307-04-27 · 15 mentions
Active: 3307-04-27 → 3308-06-23

Mentions Timeline (15 articles)
3308-06-23
Azimuth: A Historical Perspective (Part One)
Part one of a historical overview tracing Azimuth Biochemicals from the 3111 Thargoid first contact in the Musca Dark Region through the discovery of the Adamastor and Hesperus megaships to Salvation's emergence in 3307.
3307-12-31
A Retrospective of 3307 (Part Four)
Historian Sima Kalhana concludes her 3307 review, covering the Yuri Grom honey trap, Torval family rift, Colonia Bridge, NMLA's final stand, and Salvation's superweapons.
3307-12-03
Dredger Clan Resumes Nomadic Travels
The Scriveners Clan Dredger departs from Oochost PC-C c29-0 to resume nomadic travels, with Orion University abandoning its ownership claims over the ancient vessel.
3307-11-25
Dredger Clan Freed from Orion University
The Scriveners Clan dredger is fully repaired and freed from Orion University's override codes, allowing the nomadic tribe to resume independent travel.
3307-11-18
Dredger Deadlock Inspires Competing Campaigns
Competing delivery initiatives in the HIP 43670 system aim to benefit the Scriveners Clan, with Orion University offering scientific data and independent supporters gathering emergency power supplies for repairs.
3307-11-15
Dredger Clan Faces Possible Extinction
The Scriveners Clan faces possible extinction as their dredger's power and life support systems begin malfunctioning while trapped in the Oochost PC-C c29-0 system by Orion University's override codes.
3307-11-09
No Progress with Dredger Deadlock
The Scriveners Clan continues to resist Orion University's attempts to take possession of their dredger, with Canonn Interstellar Research Group offering to purchase the vessel and share the Knowledge Core.
3307-11-01
Advocacy Defends Dredger Clan
The civil rights organisation Advocacy defends the Scriveners Clan's legal ownership of their dredger, arguing that remote-community protection laws prevent forced displacement.
3307-10-22
Scriveners Clan Resists Orion University
The Scriveners Clan refuses to allow Orion University to take possession of their dredger, sealing airlocks and electrifying the hull to resist boarding attempts.
3307-10-18
Scriveners Clan Dredger Located
The Scriveners Clan dredger is located in the Oochost PC-C c29-0 system by independent pilots responding to Orion University's search request.
3307-10-14
Orion University Searches for Dredger
Orion University offers rewards to pilots who can locate the Scriveners Clan dredger, which it claims as legal property.
3307-10-13
Orion University Claims Ownership of Dredger
Orion University claims legal ownership of the Scriveners Clan dredger based on historical records from 3088, though the nomadic clan refuses outside contact.
3307-07-09
Scriveners Clan Abandons the Hesperus
The Scriveners Clan dredger leaves the Perseus Dark Region KC-V c2-2 system after stripping the Hesperus's innards. Erik Gunnarson speculates they abandoned the salvage due to unwanted attention from thousands of curious travellers, or because they detected richer resources elsewhere.
3307-06-11
The Legacy of the Hesperus
Pilots report new contact from 'Salvation' near the Hesperus and Adamastor. Commander Tyler Thorsen describes receiving a request to locate old signal beacons that could help find survivors from the megaship. The Pilots Federation cautions against working for potentially criminal organisations.
3307-04-27
Galactic Mysteries: The Hesperus
Francesca Wolfe details the discovery of the Hesperus alongside the Scriveners Clan dredger in the Perseus Dark Region. Pilots recovered encrypted logs revealing corporate rivalry, murder, and the involvement of a shadowy figure called "Salvation" who directed the search.
